feed.title: AO3 - Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Lie Lie Lie
entry.summary:
Author: krono20112025

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 186,532Chapters: 64/80Kudos: 875

Summary: Marinette Dupain-Cheng had a grand falling out with Adrien. He had learned the truth, that his father was Hawk Moth and his girlfriend had kept this secret. Chrysalis was dead,her life was spiraling out of despair. Her Maman let her leave with her Uncle Wang, but not to Shanghai. Hey, there is another restaurant opening in Gotham, and Uncle Wang needed a helper. Goodbye, City of Love, and welcome, Capital City of Crime. __________________________________________________________________ Damian Wayne does not get “dumped”. However, given the Wayne Gala is close and his brothers plan to make fun of his being alone, Damian needs a plan of action: a pretend girlfriend. The target? His friend, Maps Mizoguchi. Approaching the raven-haired under the tree, he gives the order for a romantic alliance. But when the girl turns around, it’s not Maps. It’s a confused French transfer student holding a macaron. A lesser man would apologize for the mistake. Damian Wayne? He doubles down. She has the right hair. She is a variable he can control. “You,” he decides, refusing to admit error. “You are an acceptable substitute. Don’t be late.”

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Graceful Shadow (New)
entry.summary:
Author: RavenDragon643

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,512Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 691

Summary: After Marinette's parents had enough of her lying about her bullying Lila, they send her to America to live with Sabine's old college friend, Lois Lane. Lois was happy to take in Marinette and she believed her. Now Marinette is trying to navigate her new life and maybe fall in love with a certain Robin. Will they stop Hawkmoth and Lila?

entry.summary:
Author: Ladybugrules

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 115,788Chapters: 47/?Kudos: 206

Marinette and Wang Fu went to Paris to face this threat aloneMarinette is 18 years old while the akuma class is 15-16 years oldWang Fu is Marinette's grandfatherAnother Guardian betrayed the guardians instead of Wang FuMarinette is apart of the Justice League

entry.title: Of Mortal Desires
entry.summary:
Author: Jinx-Jade (Trial_and_Error)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,023Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 61

Summary: After years of relentless battles, Marinette finds herself adrift and weary in the aftermath of Hawkmoth’s defeat. By a twist of fate, she ends up in a new city, leaving behind the tangible reminders of her trauma in pursuit of a genuine fresh start. University life brings new friendships and, unexpectedly, sweeps her into a whirlwind romance with someone who understands all too well the scars left by a childhood of being forged into a weapon. Through newfound honesty and boundaries rarely granted to them before, the former child heroes slowly begin to heal; together.

entry.title: This Side of Normal
entry.summary:
Author: Undercover_fangirl

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,506Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 6,310

Summary: Jason Todd went to Paris with one thing in mind: relax and take a break from the insanity of Gotham. Unfortunately for Jason, Paris has been just as crazy as Gotham recently. When he sees the local heroes, Jason has to make a choice: does he step in and help? Or does he act like he never saw them? A year after meeting Jason Todd, Marinette Dupain Cheng and Adrien Agreste go on a class trip to Gotham. Neither were expecting much to happen, but this is Gotham. And something always happens in Gotham. “So what you’re telling me is not only has the Justice League ignored you, but you’re also untrained and have no other backup in this entire city?” "Yeah, that's the basics."OR, the time Jason Todd accidentally found a new little brother and sister, and the shenanigans that follow.

entry.title: How A Demon Commissions An Angel
entry.summary:
Author: AlixAnonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 75,120Chapters: 22/25Kudos: 7,065

Summary: Damian Wayne really needs to get his brothers good Christmas presents or else he may be sent off to the Teen Titans because apparently his people skills "leave much to be desired". Succeeding where his brothers failed, he manages to find out the true identity of their favorite French fashion designer, MDC. Getting her to make their gifts would certainly cement his ability to say. The only problem? Those nonexistent people skills might prove detrimental as his email makes himself an enemy that's quite near her breaking point.Marinette Dupain-Cheng has had a hard two years to put it lightly. There are no more good days for her, just ones that aren't as bad. The email threatening to expose her, potentially making her already awful situation even more unbearable, comes on one of the worst. Could her reply be the first hint in years of the fire that has been nearly snuffed by her classmates? They both might be surprised to find how much life can change with some well constructed sentences and a couple terribly made aliases.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:

entry.title: Dragon AU
entry.summary:
Author: ew_selfish_art

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,499Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 43

Summary: Damian had heard of the beast, the flame-breathing, winged creature. Concern for it's well being consumed him, knowing that there would be many knights and princes attempting to slay it for the prize of the princess it supposedly protected. He wants to observe the dragon, to understand it, and to learn how best to bring back the population of Dragon-Bats he so dearly missed. Instead of being immediately eaten or burned alive, Damian finds himself within the cursed castle of the Dragon, accompanied by a charming but defensive maiden and a talking cat. Damian does not fear the challenge of studying the dragon, but he does fear for his sanity in attempting to unravel the many mysteries hidden within stone walls.

entry.title: I Got Isekai’d Into Miraculous—Now They Want Me to Break the Love-Square?! Tch. I’m a Robin. I’ll Fix It My Way.
entry.summary:
Author: krono20112025

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 163,898Chapters: 66/?Kudos: 509

Summary: Five years Damian waited for the last Miraculous Ladybug manga, and the ending sucks. Enraged, he boasted he could write a better story. A mischievous, fifth-dimensional imp quickly appears and gives him a chance to prove his claim. To prevent a disappointing ending, he must change the plot as he sees fit. What would a genius detective, Robin, do in the MLB Universe, to cause Chaos of course! ​He wakes up in a world where he is dead, but Alfred is his living ally. With just seven days until the plot kicks off, Damian dedicates himself to healing the fractured Batfamily, slowly putting the pieces back together. But he can multitask. To prevent the Love Square, he decides to aggressively befriend Marinette Dupain-Cheng the only way a Wayne knows how: by replacing her friends with competent ones and burying her under a mountain of gifts. Who knew purchasing platonic affection required so much cashmere?

entry.title: The Curse
entry.summary:
Author: Leda_Lasombra

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,073Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 57

Summary: Ra's al Ghul made the mistake of using the Miraculous to grant a wish, creating the Lazarus Pit. The Universe demanded that balance and harmony be restored, and the world suffered as a result. However, its consequences were seen, and he and his entire lineage suffered, with the curse that the celestial guardian placed upon all who possess Al Ghul blood, and with it a beast was created. For years the secret was kept, the Order was lost, until the new celestial guardian assumed responsibility for the order, cleansing the corrupting magic generated by it. A demon with little time to maintain his sanity. A guardian with the weight of the Universe's balance on her shoulders. Two extremes that need to help each other to move forward.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: To Protect The Gods (Or To Protect My Goddess)
entry.summary:
Author: Intercoursefluids

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,241Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 745

Summary: Damian had a friend. Someone he cared for so dearly he gave her a way to contact him if she ever needed him. He swore, that were she to ever call on him, he would be there.Not once in 9 years did she ever call for him.The day she did was the worst day of Damian's life.

entry.title: dead dove (please don't eat me)
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 201,705Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 194

Summary: The absolute unthinkable had happened: Damia Wayne failed an exam. How absurd. How insulting. It wasn’t her fault. She was right, she knows she was right. So why doesn’t her father believe her? Why doesn’t anyone believe her? Why won’t they listen?Why is she suddenly so afraid? -this'll be dark and heavy, refer to tagsdidn't intend to upload this but it's easier to do it here and download the epub to my kindle, hence anon

entry.title: The Life Beyond Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: Lynna5555

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,267Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 305

Summary: Everyone knows Damian Wayne left Gotham to “find himself.” What no one knows is that he never planned to return. For years, the Batfamily waited—worried, hopeful, and increasingly unsure. His rare check-ins were brief, just enough to prove he was alive. But the truth behind his silence was far gentler than they imagined. During his travels, Damian met Marinette Dupain-Cheng—a talented designer whose warmth disarmed him more easily than any blade. Love wasn’t part of his training, yet with her it felt natural. Effortless. Inevitable. Paris wasn’t the place he chose. She was. What began quietly grew into a life bright enough to eclipse the shadows he carried. For the first time, Damian allowed himself to stay… and he never told his family. Now he lives a life they know nothing about—one filled with color, creation, and a girl who makes him forget the weight of his name. But secrets don’t stay buried forever, and the Batfamily is about to learn that the son they lost didn’t disappear. He simply found a reason not to come home.
